name: 006-mica-casp-violations
description: MiCA pilot fixture: a fictional crypto-asset service provider with marketing copy that promises yield without a risk disclaimer (MICA-001), a token metadata module that references a whitepaper URL without integrity hash (MICA-002), a withdraw endpoint that moves client assets without a segregation marker (MICA-003), a deposit endpoint that logs custody events via the standard logger only with no audit-log call (MICA-004), and an order-execution path that has no market-abuse detection hook (MICA-005).
